textByHashes.8e9b2d900dbcd53ac6112324b9cbf5109341e8dd: Miscellanian soldiers came here a few days ago, saying they wanted us to pay tribute.
textByHashes.bf36c0f2afd45263193dcf5382d3c8ed8b62f283: Of course, I told them to leave.
textByHashes.ad07069860524e9bfb7e60e84f5ecf6173a00943: But in the morning, I found they'd stolen my quiver of arrows!
textByHashes.0e75ae9970c7d0c7aba4fd4100e79d8b995a32f9: They're not very valuable arrows, but I need them to do my job. Could you get them back for me?
textByHashes.93ab0d0b2902b79add52e4c14c00198707e696dc: There aren't many guards in it.
textByHashes.42d97daab48fddf6fb3010b71650111181ae641c: We don't have an army, you see.
textByHashes.4b4d00c052b454556805f905d490fedde2898dc8: Fairly pleasant, though it gets cold in the winter.
textByHashes.2f5b7aa4e04add1db3cc09b34d8d8983082137c5: Thank you for finding my arrows for me. Did you find everyone's belongings?
textByHashes.478e927f3b156497a577187b35dc54c9d1e2203f: You're more than welcome to it, for getting our belongings back.
textByHashes.92518e68f3984d295c8a98142eefc6629abb88fd: The storerooms are full, your Highness. You should talk to Advisor Ghrim to collect what we've gathered for you.
